title: Infiltrates
summary: Subtlety, guile, and stealth allow you to get in where others can’t.
tiers: Tier 3: Awareness or Skill With Attacks
gm_intrusions: Spies are treated harshly when caught. Allies disavow infiltrators who get caught. Some secrets are better left unknown.
text: Subtlety, guile, and stealth allow you to get in where others can’t.
details: Subtlety, guile, and stealth allow you to get in where others can’t.
